About Okey Dokey

In a world increasingly predicted by algorithms, Okey Dokey keeps a little room for random things to happen. The moments opened at random can be saved, passed along, and connected back to real life. Okey Dokey, open it and see what happens today.

Disclaimer:Okey Dokey is a random interactive content product. Random support amounts, drop content, and rewarded videos in the "watch to reopen" flow are uncertain. Each rewarded video is randomly selected from the current video pool, so its duration is random; only a full watch grants one free opening chance, while closing, pausing, seeking, changing speed, or leaving early does not. Saving a share poster depends on the phone system, browser support, and photo-library permission. Content is for entertainment, collection, and interaction only, and does not promise value or any specific outcome.

Drop Notes

Review how random amounts, drops, rewarded videos, and saved records work.

Random Mechanism
Each opening randomly generates the support amount and drop content, and the result cannot be previewed or chosen in advance. After the free try is used, "Watch to reopen" plays one rewarded video randomly selected from the current video pool, so the video duration changes with the selected clip. Only watching the selected video to the end grants one free opening chance; closing the popup, pausing, seeking, changing speed, or leaving early does not grant a reward. After creating a record, received drops can be kept in Saved Records; share posters can be saved through the phone system share/save panel when supported, or downloaded as a fallback.
